title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Says It Bombed Key Iranian Island With Oil Hub
summary_full: President Trump said he directed the Pentagon to “totally obliterate” military assets on Kharg Island. The U.S. said it was deploying thousands of Marines to the region.
summary_public: President Trump said he directed the Pentagon to “totally obliterate” military assets on Kharg Island. The U.S. said it was deploying thousands of Marines to the region.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. Says It Bombed Key Iranian Island
